title: Principal Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
